Precision PCB Fabrication
at Global Scale.

From rapid prototypes to high-yield industrial production, we deliver aerospace-grade PCB fabrication quality with cloud-monitored reliability.

Technically optimized workflows tailored to your project phase and volume requirements.

Rapid Prototype

Small batch fabrication for rapid iteration and testing.

24-48 Hours
  • 1-2 Layers only
  • Green Mask / White Silk
  • Standard FR4 Material
  • Standard Lead-free Finish

5-7 Days
  • Up to 12 Layers
  • Custom Mask Colors

Custom Schedule
  • Up to 32 Layers
  • Blind & Buried Vias

Military Grade

Select Category

Quality Guaranteed

ISO 9001:2015 certified manufacturing with 100% E-test on every board.

Advanced Stackups

Custom multilayer configurations up to 32 layers with controlled impedance.

Rapid Delivery

Express 24-hour turnaround available for time-sensitive prototyping needs.

DFM Inspection

Professional engineering review of every Gerber file before fabrication starts.

Manufacturing Limits at a Glance

Compare our standard and high-performance capabilities side-by-side.

PropertyPrototypeStandardAdvanced Elite
Layer Count1-2 Layers1-12 LayersUp to 32 Layers
Min Trace/Space6/6 mil4/4 mil2.5/2.5 mil
Min Hole Size0.3mm0.2mm0.1mm (Laser)
MaterialsFR4 StandardFR4, AluminumRogers, Polyimide, PTFE
Board Thickness1.6mm0.4mm - 2.4mm0.2mm - 6.0mm
Copper Weight1oz1-3ozUp to 12oz
Surface FinishHASLHASL, ENIG, OSPHard Gold, ENEPIG, Silver

Design for Excellence (DFX) Support

We support native and exported files from all major industrial EDA tools.

Altium Designer
KiCAD
Eagle PCB
Cadence Allegro
OrCAD
